summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json to record the feature request as 'pending'. No actual implementation changes were made — REQ-1 (adding an admin link in the site footer of Layout.tsx) is entirely unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a clearly visible but discreet admin access link in the site footer in Layout.tsx that navigates to the /admin route, with small/muted styling, visible on all pages and both desktop and mobile layouts.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains no changes to Layout.tsx or any frontend component. The feature request is only recorded as 'pending' in project_state.json. No admin link was added to the footer.
